heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy south, and mostly to partly cloudy north, except mostly sunny in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Chance of a shower from Montréal into the Eastern Townships. Highs in the low to mid 70s, some upper 70s in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy or becoming so. Slight chance of an early shower north. Patchy valley fog late. Lows in the mid to upper 50s, with some lower 50s in the cooler hollows north, and around 60 in the Champlain Valley. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph early, then diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Patchy valley fog early, then mostly to partly sunny. Chance of an afternoon shower northeast, and near the Vermont/Québec border. Highs in the mid to upper 70s, around 80 in the Champlain, Connecticut, and Hudson valleys, and some lower 70s northeast. Winds becoming northwest 5 to 10 mph.
